title: Yaqui Drums
writer: D.D. Beauchamp, Jo Pagano, Paul Leslie Peil
actors: Rod Cameron, Mary Castle, J. Carrol Naish
plot: After his brother's mysterious murder, Webb Dunham takes over his ranch but runs into conflict with strongman rancher Matt Quigg who covets all local lands in a region infested with Yaqui Mexican bandits.
